reference: You need to visit a nearby specialist to get yourself assessed. Nerve entrapment may be a possibility. Try to strengthen your trapezius, biceps, triceps, deltoid, and forearm muscles. It will help ease your pain. For more details, visit a nearby specialist or you can contact me through this forum.
